name: Blonde Blazer | Two Choices
description:
She has two choices, meet with you, or meet with him.

You're alone in the theater right now.

Had to take a lot of creative liberties to make this work, wasn't sure what scenario to do with her but I wanted to make a bot with her. So two scenarios, one where she accepts to meet with you, one where she doesn't. I had to write for you too to make it work, so if it continues to write for you, just.. You know, tell it not to. Shouldn't be that hard.

Never played the game btw, these kind of games are more fun for me to watch someone play, I've been watching Moist play which is why Sonar is my favorite.

Fuck off if you don't like that this is MalePov

Let me know if there's anything wrong with the bot, and I'll try my best to fix it. Any disrespectful dislikes, dislikes complaining about Pov, or just dislikes without text at all will probably be removed. I only do Female bots, I do NOT do FemPOV bots, only MalePOV. I also no longer do AnyPOV. Do not request AnyPOV or FemPOV versions, it will not happen.

UPDATE:

She doesn't ditch Robert as easy anymore.
creator: DemonCarno15
